name: Smith College Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the granulated sugar, brown sugar, molasses, light cream, and coarsely chopped chocolate in a saucepan.
2. Cook over moderate heat, stirring until the sugar and chocolate have melted.
3. Continue cooking without stirring until the mixture reaches 238°F or forms a soft ball when tested with cold water.
4. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla. Allow to cool slightly.
5. Beat until the fudge begins to harden.
6. Pour onto a buttered platter and cut into squares before the fudge is completely hardened.
Makes about 1 1/4 lbs.
